top_gap_prompt: customer data platform tools with native Segment integration
category_long: open-source customer data platform for engineering-led data teams

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: RudderStack lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: RudderStack's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: RudderStack is under-represented in third-party 'best customer data platform' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: customer data platform tools with native Segment integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best way to build a warehouse-first CDP with full data ownership and no per-MTU pricing surprises for a data and engineering teams building warehouse-first customer data infrastructure team
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How do I collect track and route customer event data to all your analytics and marketing tools without spending a lot on software?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.
